'''gahono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanometry|cyanometry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanometry|cyanometry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gahono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæheneth|gæheneth]] || [[word:gæhenej|gæhenej]] || [[word:gæhenesh|gæhenesh]] || [[word:gæhene|gæhene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gahohonoth|gahohonoth]] || [[word:gahohonoj|gahohonoj]] || [[word:gahohonosh|gahohonosh]] || [[word:gahohono|gahohono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gahonoth|gahonoth]] || [[word:gahonoj|gahonoj]] || [[word:gahonosh|gahonosh]] || [[word:gahono|gahono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gahofnoth|gahofnoth]] || [[word:gahofnoj|gahofnoj]] || [[word:gahofnosh|gahofnosh]] || [[word:gahofnof|gahofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gahonotho|gahonotho]] || [[word:gahonojo|gahonojo]] || [[word:gahonosho|gahonosho]] || [[word:gahonoko|gahonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gahonoth|gahonoth]] || [[word:gahonoj|gahonoj]] || [[word:gahonosh|gahonosh]] || [[word:gahono|gahono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gahonothol|gahonothol]] || [[word:gahonojol|gahonojol]] || [[word:gahonoshol|gahonoshol]] || [[word:gahonokol|gahonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gahonothotho|gahonothotho]] || [[word:gahonojojo|gahonojojo]] || [[word:gahonoshosho|gahonoshosho]] || [[word:gahonoko|gahonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gahonothon|gahonothon]] || [[word:gahonojon|gahonojon]] || [[word:gahonoshon|gahonoshon]] || [[word:gahonokon|gahonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gahonothoro|gahonothoro]] || [[word:gahonojoro|gahonojoro]] || [[word:gahonoshoro|gahonoshoro]] || [[word:gahonokoro|gahonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
